creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

c-s@c-s.li wrote:
> 
> I had a look again at the dependencies mentioned in DEPS.txt in the
> source code. It mentions Python and py-twisted. Nevertheless, I do not
> think that your patch is necessary, i.e. to add py-twisted to
> RUN_DEPENDS. It is already mentioned in USE_TWISTED = yes. So, I think
> my original patch was fine. What do you think? Did you have any errors
> on Tinderbox?
> 
> Carlo

Sorry I didn't reply to this sooner, but since wen committed the PR for
me, I'll assume it's all fine unless some user reports a problem.  Thank
you for taking a look at it again, and I'll run a tinderbox build first
to check dependencies if I have any questions in the future.

Thank you,
Greg
- --
Greg Larkin
